# Q1 2026 Invoice and Revenue Summary

## Revenue Overview

| Month | Dine-in | To-Go | Catering | Coffee | Other Bev | Retail | Total |
|-------|---------|-------|----------|--------|-----------|--------|-------|
| January | $18,200 | $8,400 | $3,500 | $7,800 | $2,100 | $1,200 | $41,200 |
| February | $17,800 | $7,900 | $5,200 | $7,500 | $1,900 | $1,100 | $41,400 |
| March | $19,500 | $9,100 | $6,800 | $8,200 | $2,300 | $1,500 | $47,400 |
| **Q1 Total** | **$55,500** | **$25,400** | **$15,500** | **$23,500** | **$6,300** | **$3,800** | **$130,000** |

Note: Q1 actual revenue of $130,000 exceeded projection of $127,000 by $3,000 (2.4% above forecast), driven primarily by stronger-than-expected catering bookings in March.

## Overdue Accounts Requiring Follow-Up

- **Morning Brew Catering**: $2,200 overdue (45 days). Jake Morrison has been unresponsive to last two emails. Rachel Green recommends sending a formal demand letter if not paid by April 15. This account has been late 3 of the last 6 invoices.
- **NW Creative Studio**: $1,800 overdue (38 days). First-time catering client, ordered for a launch party on February 18. Contact Mia Park at (503) 555-0934. Sent reminder on March 25.
- **Powell's Books (staff event)**: $2,000 overdue (62 days). Invoice #INV-2026-0088 from January 28 for a staff holiday party. Contact their AP department. Rachel Green flagged this as potentially needing to be written off if not collected by end of April.

- Food cost: $37,200 (28.6% of revenue — within target)
- Beverage cost: $6,100 (20.5% of coffee + other beverage revenue — within target)
